data.content: Verified existing Loom prompt-resolution implementation in src/loom_compat_prompt_resolution_tests.rs. cargo test loom_compat_prompt_resolution_tests passed (11 tests). make sanity passed with 833 tests and 95.39% coverage. Playwright MCP DOM validation confirmed rendered Implementation prompts preserve Loom heading and output semantics for autopilot (remote_main/direct branch review) and autopilot_with_pr (pr/pull request). No code changes were required in this session because the implementation was already present on the branch.
